title: oligochaetochilus tunstallii
side_effects: Oligochaetochilus tunstallii can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, nausea, and vomiting due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged consumption of the plant may also lead to kidney and liver damage, as well as an increased risk of seizures and respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of Oligochaetochilus tunstallii can result in coma, brain damage, and even death. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional or a qualified herbalist before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
